codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers the feature requirements. The operator_feedback.rs module (1074 lines) provides: (1) Parsing of CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files via OperatorFeedbackParser, (2) Higher confidence weights (0.95 base, 0.85 min) compared to learned patterns (0.4-0.7) via OPERATOR_FEEDBACK_BASE_CONFIDENCE and OPERATOR_FEEDBACK_MIN_CONFIDENCE constants, (3) mtime-based change detection via check_and_sync() and file_mtimes tracking. Integration with existing pattern_learning conventions system via patterns_to_conventions() method using pre-existing ConventionSource::FromOperatorFeedback enum variant (added in commit 3e08435). 19 tests cover parser, service, pattern types, and conventions.

issues.description: Dead code: condition `if line.starts_with('#') && (trimmed.is_empty() || !trimmed.is_empty())` - the second part `(trimmed.is_empty() || !trimmed.is_empty())` is always true. Should simply be `if line.starts_with('#')`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed Rust skill correctly. Used async_trait, thiserror patterns, proper Result error handling with ? propagation. No procedure deviations noted.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows standard Rust development workflow: cargo build, cargo test, cargo clippy. Handoff confirms skillFeedback.followedProcedure would be true.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker correctly used ConventionSource::FromOperatorFeedback which was added in prior feature (commit 3e08435 - provenance tracking). No gap - this was available in the codebase before this feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: grep shows FromOperatorFeedback in pattern_learning.rs which was part of 3e08435, before 4d34266.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md correctly documents the memory system including pattern learning and skill extraction. Worker followed documented patterns for creating new modules.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md Section 'Core Crates > swell-memory' documents the expected module structure and functionality.

summary: Feature mem-operator-feedback passes scrutiny. Implementation correctly parses CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md operator guidance files with 0.95 base confidence (vs 0.4-0.7 for learned patterns), provides mtime-based sync detection, and integrates with the existing pattern_learning conventions system. One minor dead code issue in parse_heading() at line 336 (always-true condition) but this is non-blocking. All 19 tests pass. Worker followed Rust skill and proper procedures.
